title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Marketplace Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
